response.overview: When responsible Alice (Petra Zábrodská), superficial Sofie (Lucie Pokorná), crazy Hanka (Natálie Dvořáková), and insecure Roman (Jaroslav Urbanec) head out to a Halloween party, they have no idea that a night of madness and chaos is about to begin. A chain of arguments, embarrassing moments, and bad decisions quickly spirals out of control, leading to absurd and wild situations involving zombies, police officers (Jiří Ployhar, Marko Igonda), and frustrated romantic comedy actors (Vladimír Polívka, Hynek Čermák). On her mission to rescue her younger sister Kristýna (Julie Emily Brychová), Alice discovers that the real danger lies not so much in the zombies as in mutual prejudices and poor role models.
response.title: Tahle párty je DEAD
